meta.description: Public example deck with two demo cards. Replace these with your own content before studying.

cards.prompt: Patient with crushing chest pain, diaphoresis, and ST elevation in contiguous leads.
cards.board_trigger: IF ischemic chest pain plus ST elevation -> activate cath lab
cards.level_2: Do not wait for troponin if ECG is diagnostic.
cards.level_3_recall: Aspirin, anticoagulation, P2Y12 inhibitor, high-intensity statin, and emergent PCI.
cards.level_3_treatment: Activate cath lab for PCI when available.
cards.level_3_next_step: Give aspirin and call interventional cardiology.

cards.prompt: Trauma patient with hypotension, unilateral absent breath sounds, and tracheal deviation.
cards.one_thing: Treat tension pneumothorax before confirmatory imaging.
cards.board_trigger: IF shock plus unilateral absent breath sounds -> needle decompression
cards.level_1: This is an obstructive shock emergency.
cards.level_2: Clinical diagnosis comes before chest x-ray.
cards.level_3_recall: Immediate needle decompression followed by chest tube.
